case_title: GAMEZ, ALEJANDRO vs. SAHAKIAN, JERRY AND SONNE SAHAKIAN, BOTH INDIV AND

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAMEZ, ALEJANDRO AS TO DEFENDANT SAHAKIAN, JERRY AND SONNE SAHAKIAN, BOTH INDIV ANDAS PARTNERS CARAVANSARY, A CO-PARTNERSHIP
